verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I’ve got a Father over yonder, I’ve got a Father over yonder, I’ve got a Father over yonder, On the other shore.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Some bright day I’ll go and see Him, Some bright day I’ll go and see Him, Some bright day I’ll go and see Him, On the other shore.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Won’t that be a happy meeting! Won’t that be a happy meeting! Won’t that be a happy meeting! On the other shore.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: That bright day may be tomorrow, That bright day may be tomorrow, That bright day may be tomorrow, On the other shore.
